chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D- 1545 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on urgent application 2. For order on office objection (s) 3. For order on exemption application 4. For order on stay application 5. For hearing of main case 21.8.2025 Mr.Abdullah K. Laghari, Advocate for the Petitioners ********** 1. Granted. 2to5. Through the instant petition, the petitioner, who is serving as a Primary School Teacher, seeks directions to the respondents for issuance of a notification regarding the Election Committee for Taluka Talhar, based on the names proposed by the Working Committee dated 11.05.2025. The petitioner further prays for a direction to the respondents to hold elections of the All Sindh Primary Teachers Association (ASPTA) strictly in accordance with the bylaws governing the said Association. At the very outset, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner has already moved application to respondent No.2 in this regard, which remain undecided and is presently pending. He further submits that the petitioner shall be satisfied if appropriate directions are issued to respondent No.2 to decide the pending application after affording the petitioner an opportunity of hearing and in accordance with law. In view of the above submission, this petition is disposed of along with listed application with directions to respondent No.2 to decide the pending application of the petitioner expeditiously, after providing the petitioner a fair opportunity of hearing and strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
